mano_cua.result_summary: 发现两个bug：1)视觉bug：filter+allow-clear的Select选中值后hover不显示清空图标(X)，但点击对应位置功能正常；2)功能bug：通过清空图标清除选中值后重新打开下拉框，筛选状态未重置，仍只显示之前筛选的'Option 1'而非全部6个选项。重新输入1筛选并选择Option 1后显示正确。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Found 2 bugs: 1) Visual bug - clear icon invisible when hovering over filter+allow-clear Select with selected value. 2) Functional bug - after clearing selection, filter state not reset, dropdown shows only previously filtered 'Option 1' instead of all 6 options. Re-filtering with '1' and selecting Option 1 works correctly, displaying 'Option 1' as selected value.
